'''zazhoto''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:coachwood|coachwood]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-zh-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coachwood|coachwood]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zazhoto
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæzheteth|zæzheteth]] || [[word:zæzhetej|zæzhetej]] || [[word:zæzhetesh|zæzhetesh]] || [[word:zæzhete|zæzhete]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zazhozhototh|zazhozhototh]] || [[word:zazhozhotoj|zazhozhotoj]] || [[word:zazhozhotosh|zazhozhotosh]] || [[word:zazhozhoto|zazhozhoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zazhototh|zazhototh]] || [[word:zazhotoj|zazhotoj]] || [[word:zazhotosh|zazhotosh]] || [[word:zazhoto|zazhoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zazhoftoth|zazhoftoth]] || [[word:zazhoftoj|zazhoftoj]] || [[word:zazhoftosh|zazhoftosh]] || [[word:zazhoftof|zazhoftof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zazhototho|zazhototho]] || [[word:zazhotojo|zazhotojo]] || [[word:zazhotosho|zazhotosho]] || [[word:zazhotoko|zazhotoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zazhototh|zazhototh]] || [[word:zazhotoj|zazhotoj]] || [[word:zazhotosh|zazhotosh]] || [[word:zazhoto|zazhoto]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zazhotothol|zazhotothol]] || [[word:zazhotojol|zazhotojol]] || [[word:zazhotoshol|zazhotoshol]] || [[word:zazhotokol|zazhotokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zazhotothotho|zazhotothotho]] || [[word:zazhotojojo|zazhotojojo]] || [[word:zazhotoshosho|zazhotoshosho]] || [[word:zazhotoko|zazhotoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zazhotothon|zazhotothon]] || [[word:zazhotojon|zazhotojon]] || [[word:zazhotoshon|zazhotoshon]] || [[word:zazhotokon|zazhotokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zazhotothoro|zazhotothoro]] || [[word:zazhotojoro|zazhotojoro]] || [[word:zazhotoshoro|zazhotoshoro]] || [[word:zazhotokoro|zazhotokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
